'''lathama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khedivia|khedivia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khedivia|khedivia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lathama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læthæmæth|læthæmæth]] || [[word:læthæmæj|læthæmæj]] || [[word:læthæmæsh|læthæmæsh]] || [[word:læthæmæ|læthæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lathathamath|lathathamath]] || [[word:lathathamaj|lathathamaj]] || [[word:lathathamash|lathathamash]] || [[word:lathathama|lathathama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lathamath|lathamath]] || [[word:lathamaj|lathamaj]] || [[word:lathamash|lathamash]] || [[word:lathama|lathama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lathafmath|lathafmath]] || [[word:lathafmaj|lathafmaj]] || [[word:lathafmash|lathafmash]] || [[word:lathafmaf|lathafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lathamatha|lathamatha]] || [[word:lathamaja|lathamaja]] || [[word:lathamasha|lathamasha]] || [[word:lathamaka|lathamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lathamath|lathamath]] || [[word:lathamaj|lathamaj]] || [[word:lathamash|lathamash]] || [[word:lathama|lathama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lathamathal|lathamathal]] || [[word:lathamajal|lathamajal]] || [[word:lathamashal|lathamashal]] || [[word:lathamakal|lathamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lathamathatha|lathamathatha]] || [[word:lathamajaja|lathamajaja]] || [[word:lathamashasha|lathamashasha]] || [[word:lathamaka|lathamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lathamathan|lathamathan]] || [[word:lathamajan|lathamajan]] || [[word:lathamashan|lathamashan]] || [[word:lathamakan|lathamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lathamathaoro|lathamathaoro]] || [[word:lathamajaoro|lathamajaoro]] || [[word:lathamashaoro|lathamashaoro]] || [[word:lathamakaoro|lathamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
